description_long: This is a rectangular, soft-sided handbag made of tan leather with cream-colored piping along the edges. The bag features a prominent zipper running along one of the longer sides, with a visible metal zipper pull. On the top surface, there are two short, flat handles attached with metal hardware, suggesting it is designed to be carried by hand. The leather surface appears slightly worn, giving it a vintage or well-used look. The overall construction is simple and functional, with no visible decorative elements or branding. The bag's compact size and soft structure make it suitable for carrying small personal items in an urban environment.
description: A tan leather rectangular handbag with cream piping, a side zipper, and two short top handles. The design is simple, functional, and slightly worn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the zipper running horizontally across the side and the two top handles visible on the upper surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bag's depth, rounded corners, and the cream piping along the edges.
description_view_2: Rear view with the zipper and zipper pull more clearly visible, as well as the two top handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain leather surface and the cream piping, with no zipper visible.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, flat handles attached to the top with metal hardware; not adjustable; designed for hand carrying.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure running along one of the long sides, with a visible metal zipper pull.
